testcase.name: TC01

failure.message: Welcome message not found in page content. Actual content: Welcome to Safe Railway With Safe Railway's service, you can: Look up train timetable to prepare for your trip Check for ticket price to find what suits your need Book your ticket online in a few easy steps And a lot more expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Welcome message not found in page content. Actual content: Welcome to Safe Railway With Safe Railway's service, you can: Look up train timetable to prepare for your trip Check for ticket price to find what suits your need Book your ticket online in a few easy steps And a lot more expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at testcases.LoginTests.TC01(LoginTests.java:29) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:104) Count: 16 >>> Global Test Order (Alphabetical): - TC01 - TC02 - TC03 - TC04 - TC05 - TC06 - TC07 - TC08 - TC09 - TC10 - TC11 - TC12 - TC13 - TC14 - TC15 - TC16 >>> Intercepting methods. Count: 16 >>> Global Test Order (Alphabetical): - TC01 - TC02 - TC03 - TC04 - TC05 - TC06 - TC07 - TC08 - TC09 - TC10 - TC11 - TC12 - TC13 - TC14 - TC15 - TC16 Pre-condition Starting test: TC01 TC01 - User can log into Railway with valid username and password

testcase.name: TC02

failure.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form. ] but found [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.]

testcase.name: TC03

failure.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

testcase.name: TC04
testcase.system-out: >>> Processing TC03 as FAILURE (Red) Post-condition Pre-condition Starting test: TC04 TC04 - Login page displays when un-logged User clicks on 'Book ticket' tab

testcase.name: TC05

failure.message: Error message incorrect expected [You have used 4 out of 5 login attempts. After all 5 have been used, you will be unable to login for 15 minutes.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

testcase.name: TC08

failure.message: User was able to login without activating the account! (Security activation bypass)
